name: skill-router-g6
description: Self-learning MCP skill router for AI agents — routes queries to best skills using Thompson sampling + RAG + DPP diversity

tools.name: route_skills
tools.description: Find the best Hermes skills for a given task using G6 agentic self-learning router

tools.name: record_outcome
tools.description: Record whether routed skills were helpful — feeds the self-learning loop

tools.name: router_stats
tools.description: Show Skill Router G6 stats: handbook, posteriors, history and top skills

tools.name: router_history
tools.description: Show the last 10 routing decisions for audit
